questions.question: Housekeeping ka primary goal kya hai?

options.A: Ek clean, organized aur safe environment maintain karna
options.B: Sirf furniture saaf karna

questions.explanation: Housekeeping ka mukhya uddeshya ek swachh, vyavasthit aur surakshit vatavaran banaye rakhna hai.

questions.question: Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) pehenna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Kaam jaldi karne ke liye
options.C: Khud ko chemicals aur hazards se bachane ke liye
options.D: Dusre logo ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: PPE jaise gloves, masks, aur safety shoes pehenna zaroori hai takki cleaning karte waqt khud ko chemicals aur anya khatron se bachaya ja sake.

questions.question: Fire extinguisher ko operate karne ke liye kaun sa method use karte hain?

options.B: PUSH, ASK, STAND, SPRAY

questions.explanation: Fire extinguisher ko operate karne ka sahi tareeka PASS method hai: Pull the pin, Aim at the base of the fire, Squeeze the handle, Sweep side to side.

questions.question: Agar aapko floor par paani gira hua dikhe, toh aapka pehla kadam kya hoga?

options.B: Kisi aur ko saaf karne ke liye bolenge
options.C: Turant saaf karenge aur 'Wet Floor' sign lagayenge
options.D: Upar se chal kar nikal jayenge

questions.explanation: Floor par gire hue paani se slip hone ka khatra hota hai. Isliye, use turant saaf karna aur warning sign lagana zaroori hai.

questions.question: Housekeeping staff ke liye good personal hygiene kyun important hai?

options.B: Germs aur infections ko failne se rokne ke liye
options.C: Costumers ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Achhi personal hygiene, jaise haath dhona, germs aur infections ko failne se rokti hai, jo housekeeping ke kaam mein bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Material Safety Data Sheet (MSDS) kya provide karta hai?

options.B: Chemicals ke safe handling, storage aur emergency procedures ki jaankari

questions.explanation: MSDS (ab SDS) chemicals ke baare mein critical safety information deta hai, jaise unhe kaise handle karein, store karein aur emergency mein kya karein.

questions.question: Emergency exit routes ko hamesha clear kyun rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Emergency mein logo ko surakshit nikalne ke liye
options.D: Sirf raat mein use karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Emergency exit routes hamesha clear hone chahiye takki aag ya kisi aur khatre ki sthiti mein log building se surakshit bahar nikal sakein.

questions.question: Ek housekeeping professional ke liye punctuality kyun essential hai?

options.A: Sirf manager ko khush karne ke liye
options.B: Work schedule maintain karne aur dusre tasks ko affect na karne ke liye
options.D: Training mein der se aane ke liye

questions.explanation: Punctuality zaroori hai takki daily work schedule smoothly chale aur dusre cleaning tasks ya team members ka kaam affect na ho.

questions.question: Agar aapko koi broken electrical wire dikhe, toh aap kya karenge?

options.A: Use tape se theek karne ki koshish karenge
options.B: Usko ignore kar denge
options.D: Khud hi repair karne ki koshish karenge

questions.explanation: Broken electrical wires shock ka khatra paida karte hain. Unhe turant supervisor ko report karna chahiye aur unse door rehna chahiye.

questions.question: Ergonomics ka housekeeping mein kya importance hai?

options.B: Sahi body posture aur techniques ka use karna injuries se bachne ke liye

questions.explanation: Ergonomics ka matlab hai kaam ko aise design karna ki woh worker ke liye comfortable aur safe ho. Housekeeping mein iska matlab hai sahi posture aur lifting techniques ka use karna takki injuries se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Housekeeping ke context mein 'cross-contamination' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Do alag-alag cleaning chemicals ko mix karna
options.B: Germs ko ek area se dusre area mein transfer karna
options.C: Do alag-alag floors ko ek saath saaf karna
options.D: Ek hi area ko baar-baar saaf karna

questions.explanation: Cross-contamination tab hoti hai jab germs ek surface ya area se dusre surface ya area par transfer ho jaate hain, jaise restroom mop ko office floor par use karna.

questions.question: Ek effective cleaning program ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Regular training, proper equipment aur consistent procedures

questions.explanation: Ek effective cleaning program ke liye staff ki regular training, sahi equipment ka upyog aur consistent cleaning procedures ka palan karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Housekeeping mein 'safety audit' kyun kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Employees ko punish karne ke liye
options.B: Potential hazards ko identify aur rectify karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf paper work badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Safety audit ka uddeshya work environment mein maujood khatron (hazards) ko pehchanna aur unhe theek karna hai, takki accidents ko roka ja sake.

questions.question: Agar aapko cleaning karte samay koi sharp object (jaise broken glass) dikhe, toh aap use kaise dispose karenge?

options.A: Nange haathon se utha kar dustbin mein fenk denge
options.B: Paper mein lapet kar regular trash mein daal denge
options.C: Thick gloves pehen kar, use cardboard box ya puncture-proof container mein daal kar properly dispose karenge

questions.explanation: Sharp objects ko hamesha puncture-proof container mein dispose karna chahiye, gloves pehen kar, takki kisi ko chot na lage.

questions.question: Housekeeping mein 'colour-coding' system ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Cleaning equipment ko stylish banane ke liye
options.B: Cross-contamination rokne aur specific areas ke liye specific tools use karne ke liye
options.D: Kam chemicals use karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Colour-coding (jaise red for restrooms, blue for general areas) cross-contamination ko rokta hai aur ensure karta hai ki sahi tool sahi jagah use ho.

questions.question: Ek facility mein 'first aid kit' kahan honi chahiye?

options.B: Easily accessible jagah par, sabko pata ho ki kahan hai
options.D: Har floor par hidden jagah mein

questions.explanation: First aid kit hamesha easily accessible honi chahiye aur sabhi staff ko uski location pata honi chahiye, takki emergency mein turant use kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Housekeeping team mein 'teamwork' kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Tasks ko efficiently complete karne aur ek dusre ko support karne ke liye
options.C: Individual performance kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Teamwork se tasks efficiently complete hote hain, ek dusre ko support milta hai aur overall productivity badhti hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa cleaning agent germs ko kill karta hai?

options.B: Polish

questions.explanation: Disinfectants aise chemicals hote hain jo surfaces par maujood germs aur bacteria ko kill karte hain.

questions.question: Cleaning chemicals ko store karte samay kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Food items ke saath store karna
options.B: Original labeled containers mein store karna aur bacchon ki pahunch se door rakhna

questions.explanation: Chemicals ko hamesha unke original labeled containers mein, thandi, sukhi jagah par aur bacchon ki pahunch se door rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Vacuum cleaner ka primary use kya hai?

options.B: Dust aur debris ko carpets aur hard floors se remove karna

questions.explanation: Vacuum cleaner ka mukhya upyog carpets, rugs aur hard floors se dhool, mitti aur chote kachre ko saaf karna hai.

questions.question: Sahi 'dilution ratio' maintain karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Chemicals jaldi khatam karne ke liye
options.B: Cleaning chemicals ki effectiveness aur safety maintain karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf bottle khali karne ke liye
options.D: Kaam ko mushkil banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Sahi dilution ratio use karne se chemical effective rehta hai aur surface ko nuksan nahi pahunchata, saath hi users ke liye bhi safe rehta hai.

questions.question: Mop bucket mein do compartments kyun hote hain?

options.A: Ek mein paani aur dusre mein snacks rakhne ke liye
options.B: Ek mein clean water/solution aur dusre mein dirty water collect karne ke liye, cross-contamination rokne ke liye

questions.explanation: Two-bucket system cross-contamination ko rokta hai, jahan ek bucket mein clean solution aur dusre mein dirty water collect hota hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa tool unreachable areas se dust hatane ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Duster with an extendable handle

questions.explanation: Extendable handle wala duster high ceilings, fans aur anya unreachable surfaces se dhool saaf karne ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Acidic cleaners kis type ki surfaces par use karne se bachna chahiye?

options.B: Glass

questions.explanation: Acidic cleaners marble, granite jaise natural stone surfaces ko damage kar sakte hain, unki shine hata sakte hain ya unhe etch kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Squeegee ka use primarily kis kaam ke liye hota hai?

options.B: Windows aur glass surfaces se cleaning solution remove karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Squeegee ka upyog windows, mirrors aur anya glass surfaces se paani ya cleaning solution ko streak-free remove karne ke liye kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Floor scrubber machine ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Manually sweeping se tez aur zyada effective cleaning
options.B: Sirf noise create karna

questions.explanation: Floor scrubber machine bade floors ko manually sweeping aur mopping se zyada tez aur thoroughly saaf karti hai.

questions.question: Chemicals ko mix karte waqt kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Koi bhi chemical kisi bhi dusre chemical ke saath mix kar sakte hain
options.B: Hamesha manufacturer ke instructions follow karein aur kabhi bhi alag-alag chemicals ko bina jaankari ke mix na karein
options.C: Sirf garam paani mein mix karein
options.D: Hazards se bachne ke liye gloves nahi pehne

questions.explanation: Alag-alag chemicals ko mix karne se dangerous fumes ya reactions ho sakte hain. Hamesha manufacturer ke instructions follow karein.

questions.question: Microfiber cloth ka kya advantage hai over normal cotton cloth?

options.B: Ye dust, dirt aur bacteria ko zyada effectively trap karta hai aur streak-free cleaning deta hai
options.C: Ye zyada paani absorb karta hai

questions.explanation: Microfiber cloths apni microscopic fibers ki wajah se dhool, gandagi aur bacteria ko behtar tarike se pakadte hain aur streak-free finish dete hain.

questions.question: Floor polisher machine ka use kyun hota hai?

options.A: Floor se daag hatane ke liye
options.B: Floor par shine aur protective layer add karne ke liye
options.C: Floor ko dry karne ke liye
options.D: Floor ko rough banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Floor polisher machine floors ko shine dene aur unpar ek protective layer apply karne ke liye use hoti hai, jisse floor zyada attractive aur durable lagta hai.

questions.question: Agar kisi chemical se skin par irritation ho jaye, toh immediate action kya hoga?

options.B: Affected area ko turant paani se dho lenge aur medical help lenge agar zaroori ho

questions.explanation: Chemical burn ya irritation hone par turant affected area ko paani se dhona chahiye aur medical attention leni chahiye.

questions.question: High-pressure washer ka upyog kis tarah ki cleaning ke liye kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Office desks saaf karne ke liye
options.B: Outdoor areas, walls, aur vehicles se stubborn dirt hatane ke liye

questions.explanation: High-pressure washer ka upyog bahari surfaces jaise walls, driveways aur vehicles se ziddi gandagi aur daag hatane ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Cleaning equipment ki proper maintenance kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf naya equipment kharidne se bachne ke liye
options.B: Unki efficiency, lifespan aur safe operation ensure karne ke liye
options.C: Unhe jaldi kharab karne ke liye
options.D: Extra budget spend karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper maintenance se equipment ki efficiency bani rehti hai, unki life badhti hai aur woh safely operate hote hain.

questions.question: Kaun sa chemical floor se grease aur oil stains hatane mein effective hai?

options.B: Degreaser

questions.explanation: Degreasers specifically grease, oil aur heavy dirt ko dissolve aur remove karne ke liye formulate kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Ek 'dry mop' ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: Loose dust aur debris ko hard floors se collect karna

questions.explanation: Dry mop (ya dust mop) ka upyog hard floors se loose dhool, mitti aur halka kachra collect karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Dusting karte samay kaun si technique use karni chahiye?

options.B: Neeche se upar ki taraf (Bottom-to-top)

questions.explanation: Top-to-bottom dusting se dhool neeche girti hai aur neeche ki surfaces ko baad mein saaf kiya ja sakta hai, jisse re-dusting se bacha jaata hai.

questions.question: Restroom cleaning karte samay sabse pehle kya saaf karna chahiye?

options.B: Toilet bowls

questions.explanation: Restroom cleaning mein sabse pehle dustbins empty karna chahiye taaki kachra hataya ja sake aur uske baad disinfecting process shuru ho.

questions.question: Mopping karte samay 'figure-eight' technique kyun use ki jaati hai?

options.B: Floor ko evenly clean karne aur streaking se bachne ke liye
options.C: Zyada paani use karne ke liye
options.D: Kaam ko slow karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Figure-eight technique se mop evenly move karta hai, jisse floor par streaks nahi aate aur cleaning uniform hoti hai.

questions.question: Office desks aur work surfaces ko daily clean karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Germs aur bacteria ke buildup ko rokne aur hygiene maintain karne ke liye
options.C: Employees ko jaldi ghar bhejne ke liye
options.D: Office supplies kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Daily cleaning se desks par germs accumulate nahi hote, jisse employees ki health aur hygiene maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: Pantry area ki cleaning mein kya special consideration honi chahiye?

options.B: Food safety aur hygiene ka dhyan rakhna, surfaces ko disinfect karna

questions.explanation: Pantry mein food items handle hote hain, isliye yahan food safety aur hygiene ka vishesh dhyan rakhna zaroori hai, surfaces ko regular disinfect karna chahiye.

questions.question: Glass surfaces (windows, mirrors) ko streak-free clean karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Sahi glass cleaner aur microfiber cloth ya squeegee ka use karna
options.C: Kisi bhi kapde se saaf karna
options.D: Soap aur water se saaf karna

questions.explanation: Streak-free shine ke liye ek achha glass cleaner aur lint-free microfiber cloth ya squeegee ka upyog karna chahiye.

questions.question: Toilet bowl ko clean karte samay kaun sa tool use karna chahiye?

options.B: Toilet brush aur toilet bowl cleaner

questions.explanation: Toilet bowls ko specifically design kiye gaye toilet brush aur toilet bowl cleaner se saaf karna chahiye takki germs effectively remove ho sakein.

questions.question: Daily waste collection ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Odours ko rokna, pests ko attract hone se bachana aur hygiene maintain karna

questions.explanation: Daily waste collection se badboo nahi aati, keede-makode attract nahi hote aur overall hygiene maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: Agar floor par chewing gum chipki ho, toh use kaise remove karenge?

options.B: Ice ya freezing spray se hard karke scraper se gently remove karenge

questions.explanation: Chewing gum ko ice ya freezing spray se hard karke gently scrape karne se woh aasaani se nikal jaati hai bina surface ko damage kiye.

questions.question: Office chairs aur upholstery ko regular basis par kaise maintain karte hain?

options.B: Vacuum cleaner se dust remove karenge aur spot cleaning karenge

questions.explanation: Chairs aur upholstery ko regular vacuuming aur spot cleaning se maintain kiya jaata hai takki dhool aur chote-mote daag saaf ho sakein.

questions.question: Conference room ki cleaning mein kya special focus hona chahiye?

options.B: Table surfaces, multimedia equipment aur chairs ko clean aur sanitize karna

questions.explanation: Conference room mein table, equipment aur chairs ko clean aur sanitize karna zaroori hai, kyunki yahan log meetings karte hain aur surfaces ko touch karte hain.

questions.question: Agar kisi surface par water marks ya hard water stains ho, toh unhe kaise remove karenge?

options.A: Sirf dry cloth se ponch denge
options.B: Vinegar solution ya specialized hard water stain remover use karenge

questions.explanation: Vinegar solution ya specific hard water stain removers calcium deposits ko dissolve karne mein effective hote hain jo water marks create karte hain.

questions.question: Common areas (lobbies, corridors) ki cleaning schedule mein kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.B: Daily sweeping/mopping, dusting aur regular spot cleaning
options.D: Jab dirty dikhe tabhi clean karna

questions.explanation: Common areas mein high footfall hota hai, isliye unhe daily sweeping/mopping, dusting aur spot cleaning ke saath maintain karna chahiye.

questions.question: Dustbin liners ka use kyun kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Dustbins ko zyada attractiv banane ke liye
options.B: Dustbins ko clean rakhne aur waste ko easily dispose karne ke liye
options.C: Waste ko zyada der tak store karne ke liye
options.D: Waste ko compact karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Dustbin liners dustbins ko saaf rakhte hain aur waste ko easily aur hygienically dispose karne mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Entry mats ka kya role hai office cleanliness mein?

options.B: Bahari mitti aur moisture ko andar aane se rokna

questions.explanation: Entry mats bahar se aane wali mitti, dhool aur moisture ko trap karte hain, jisse andar ka floor saaf rehta hai.

questions.question: Agar kisi surface par grease stain ho, toh use kaise remove karenge?

options.B: Degreaser ya dish soap solution use karenge

questions.explanation: Grease stains ko dissolve karne ke liye degreaser ya dish soap solution effective hota hai.

questions.question: Daily cleaning ke baad equipment ko kaise maintain karna chahiye?

options.A: Jaise hai waise hi chhod denge
options.B: Clean, dry aur properly store karenge

questions.explanation: Daily cleaning ke baad equipment ko saaf, sukha kar aur sahi tarike se store karna chahiye takki woh lambe samay tak chal sakein.

questions.question: 'Deep cleaning' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Regular cleaning se zyada thorough cleaning, jisme hard-to-reach areas aur hidden dirt bhi saaf ki jaati hai

questions.explanation: Deep cleaning mein un areas par bhi dhyan diya jaata hai jo regular cleaning mein chhoot jaate hain, jaise grout lines, high-level dusting, etc.

questions.question: Carpet cleaning ke liye generally kaun se methods use hote hain?

options.B: Vacuuming, shampooing, hot water extraction (steam cleaning)

questions.explanation: Carpet cleaning ke liye common methods mein regular vacuuming, spot cleaning, shampooing aur hot water extraction shamil hain.

questions.question: Bio-hazard waste ko kaise dispose karna chahiye?

options.B: Special bio-hazard bags aur containers mein, specific protocols follow karte hue
options.D: Kitchen waste ke saath mix kar denge

questions.explanation: Bio-hazard waste (jaise medical waste) ko specific color-coded bags aur containers mein dispose karna chahiye, strict safety protocols ke saath.

questions.question: Window cleaning mein 'safety harness' ka upyog kab zaroori hota hai?

options.B: Jab high-rise buildings ya heights par kaam kar rahe ho

questions.explanation: High-rise windows ya heights par kaam karte samay safety harness aur anya fall protection equipment ka upyog karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Waste segregation ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sabhi kachre ko ek saath milana
options.B: Alag-alag types ke waste ko alag-alag bins mein collect karna (jaise dry, wet, recyclable)

questions.explanation: Waste segregation ka matlab hai kachre ko uske type ke hisaab se alag-alag bins mein dalna, jaise wet waste, dry waste, recyclable waste.

questions.question: Recycling kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf extra kaam badhane ke liye
options.B: Environmental pollution kam karne, natural resources bachane aur landfill space reduce karne ke liye
options.D: Energy zyada use karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Recycling se paryavaran ko nuksan kam hota hai, prakritik sansadhan bachate hain aur kachre ka dher kam hota hai.

questions.question: Upholstery cleaning karte samay kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.B: Fabric type check karna aur suitable cleaner use karna, colorfastness test karna

questions.explanation: Upholstery cleaning se pehle fabric type aur colorfastness check karna zaroori hai takki damage se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Agar aapko kisi area mein pest (jaise choohe, cockroach) dikhe, toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Turant supervisor ko report karenge
options.C: Khud hi pest control karne ki koshish karenge

questions.explanation: Pests ki presence ko turant supervisor ko report karna chahiye takki professional pest control measures liye ja sakein.

questions.question: High-level dusting (jaise ceiling fans, light fixtures) ke liye kaun sa equipment use hota hai?

options.B: Extendable pole ke saath duster ya vacuum cleaner attachment

questions.explanation: Extendable poles aur special attachments high-level surfaces tak pahunchne aur unhe effectively dust karne mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Floor stripping ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Purane wax/sealant layers ko remove karna naye coating ke liye

questions.explanation: Floor stripping mein chemical strippers ka use karke floor se purani wax ya sealant ki layers ko hataya jaata hai, jisse naye coatings achhe se apply ho sakein.

questions.question: Waste management hierarchy mein 'Reduce' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Waste generation ko kam karna, jaise kam single-use items use karna

questions.explanation: Waste management hierarchy mein Reduce ka matlab hai kachra utpann hone se pehle hi uski matra kam karna.

questions.question: Agar kisi surface par graffiti ho, toh use kaise remove karenge?

options.B: Specific graffiti remover aur proper technique use karenge

questions.explanation: Graffiti ko hatane ke liye specialized graffiti removers ki zaroorat hoti hai, jo surface ko damage kiye bina paint ko dissolve karte hain.

questions.question: Medical waste ko handle karte samay kya PPE pehenna chahiye?

options.B: Gloves, mask, face shield, aur protective gown

questions.explanation: Medical waste handle karte samay comprehensive PPE jaise gloves, mask, face shield aur protective gown pehenna zaroori hai takki infection se bacha ja sake.

questions.question: Garden aur outdoor areas ki cleaning mein kya shamil hai?

options.B: Leaves hatana, bins empty karna, pathways saaf karna aur litter collect karna

questions.explanation: Outdoor cleaning mein leaves, litter hatana, bins empty karna aur pathways ko saaf rakhna shamil hai.

questions.question: Specialized cleaning tasks ke liye 'risk assessment' kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf paper work badhane ke liye
options.B: Potential hazards ko pehchanne aur unhe control karne ke liye
options.C: Kaam ko mushkil banane ke liye
options.D: Extra budget spend karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Risk assessment se kisi bhi specialized cleaning task mein maujood khatron ko pehchana jaata hai aur unhe kam karne ke liye steps liye jaate hain.

questions.question: HVAC vents (AC ducts) ki cleaning kyun important hai?

options.B: Air quality improve karne aur energy efficiency badhane ke liye
options.C: Zyada dust collect karne ke liye

questions.explanation: HVAC vents ki cleaning se air quality behtar hoti hai, allergens aur dust kam hote hain aur system ki energy efficiency badhti hai.

questions.question: Agar kisi area mein mould ya fungal growth dikhe, toh use kaise tackle karenge?

options.B: PPE pehen kar, specialized mould cleaner use karenge aur ventilation ensure karenge, severe cases mein professional help lenge

questions.explanation: Mould health hazards create kar sakta hai. Use PPE pehen kar, anti-fungal cleaners se saaf karna chahiye aur achhi ventilation maintain karni chahiye.

questions.question: Housekeeping staff ke liye 'hand washing' kyun critical hai?

options.B: Germs aur bacteria ko failne se rokne aur hygiene maintain karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper hand washing germs ko failne se rokta hai aur cross-contamination ke risk ko kam karta hai, jo hygiene ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Ek professional housekeeping staff member ko customer se kaise interact karna chahiye?

options.B: Politely, respectfully aur helpful tareeke se

questions.explanation: Customer interaction mein polite, respectful aur helpful rehna facility ki positive image banata hai.

questions.question: Pest control mein 'integrated pest management (IPM)' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Pests ko control karne ke liye multiple methods (chemical, non-chemical, sanitation) ka combination use karna

questions.explanation: IPM ek comprehensive approach hai jisme pests ko control karne ke liye chemical, physical aur biological methods ka combination use kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar koi occupant cleaning ke tareeke se satisfied na ho, toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Uski baat dhyan se sunenge, sorry bolenge aur problem solve karne ki koshish karenge ya supervisor ko report karenge

questions.explanation: Complaints ko calmly sunna, apologies dena aur resolution provide karna ya supervisor ko report karna professional behavior hai.

questions.question: Food preparation areas mein hygiene maintain karna kyun critical hai?

options.B: Foodborne illnesses ko rokne aur food safety ensure karne ke liye
options.D: Extra chemicals use karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Food preparation areas mein hygiene bahut zaroori hai takki foodborne illnesses na faile aur khana surakshit rahe.

questions.question: Pest entry points ko block karna kyun important hai?

options.B: Pests ko building mein ghusne se rokne ke liye

questions.explanation: Cracks, gaps aur openings ko seal karne se pests ko building mein ghusne se roka ja sakta hai, jo pest control ka ek mukhya hissa hai.

questions.question: Housekeeping staff ke liye 'discretion' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Dusre logo ki personal baatein sunna
options.B: Occupants ki privacy ka samman karna aur unki personal belongings ko disturb na karna

questions.explanation: Discretion ka matlab hai dusre logo ki privacy ka samman karna aur unki personal cheezon ko na chhedna ya unki jaankari share na karna.

questions.question: Bathroom towels aur hand dryers mein se zyada hygienic option kaun sa hai?

options.B: Hand dryers (agar properly maintained ho)

questions.explanation: Paper towels generally sabse hygienic option maane jaate hain kyunki woh single-use hote hain aur cross-contamination ka risk kam karte hain. Hand dryers bhi hygienic ho sakte hain agar properly maintained ho.

questions.question: Agar aapko koi lost-and-found item mile, toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Turant supervisor ko report karenge aur item unke paas jama kar denge

questions.explanation: Lost-and-found items ko turant supervisor ko report karna aur unhe jama karna professional integrity ka hissa hai.

questions.question: Pest control mein 'sanitation' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Food sources, water aur shelter ko eliminate karke pests ko control karna

questions.explanation: Achhi sanitation (jaise food spills saaf karna, kachra properly dispose karna) pests ko attract hone se rokti hai aur unke liye suitable environment ko kam karti hai.

questions.question: Customer service mein 'active listening' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Customer ki baat ko dhyan se sunna, samajhna aur sahi feedback dena
options.D: Customer ki baat ko ignore karna

questions.explanation: Active listening se customer ko lagta hai ki unki baat suni ja rahi hai aur unki problems ko seriously liya ja raha hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko koi employee ya visitor ill dikhe, toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Uski madad karne ki koshish karenge aur zaroorat padne par medical assistance ya supervisor ko call karenge
options.D: Usko paani denge aur chalte banenge

questions.explanation: Kisi ill person ko dekhne par madad karna aur zaroorat padne par medical ya supervisory help lena ek responsible action hai.

questions.question: Housekeeping staff ke liye 'professional appearance' kyun important hai?

options.B: Facility ki image maintain karne aur trust build karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Clean uniform, achhi grooming aur professional appearance facility ki image ko reflect karta hai aur occupants mein trust build karta hai.

questions.question: Feedback ko positively lena kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sirf boss ko khush karne ke liye
options.B: Apni skills ko improve karne aur services ko better banane ke liye
options.C: Gusse mein aa jane ke liye
options.D: Apni mistakes ko chhupane ke liye

questions.explanation: Feedback ko positively lene se aap apni performance ko improve kar sakte hain aur apni services ko aur behtar bana sakte hain.

questions.question: Agar aapko koi suspicious activity dikhe, toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Turant supervisor ya security ko report karenge

questions.explanation: Suspicious activities ko turant report karna security protocols ka hissa hai aur facility ki safety ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Customer interactions mein 'body language' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Positive body language (jaise eye contact, smile) trust build karti hai aur professionalism dikhati hai

questions.explanation: Positive body language, jaise eye contact aur ek friendly smile, customer interaction ko behtar banati hai aur professionalism darshati hai.

questions.question: Housekeeping mein 'time management' kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf jaldi ghar jaane ke liye
options.B: Tasks ko efficiently complete karne, deadlines meet karne aur productivity badhane ke liye
options.C: Kaam ko delay karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Achha time management tasks ko efficiently complete karne, deadlines meet karne aur overall productivity badhane mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Ek acchi 'reporting' system ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Problems, maintenance issues aur inventory needs ko effectively communicate karna

questions.explanation: Effective reporting se problems, maintenance issues aur inventory needs ko time par communicate kiya ja sakta hai, jisse unhe solve karna aasaan hota hai.

questions.question: Agar building mein 'fire alarm' baje, toh aapka pehla action kya hoga?

options.B: Turant building ko evacuate karenge emergency exit se

questions.explanation: Fire alarm bajne par sabse pehle building ko turant aur surakshit roop se evacuate karna chahiye.

questions.question: Record-keeping (jaise cleaning logs) ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Cleaning activities ko track karna, compliance ensure karna aur quality control maintain karna

questions.explanation: Cleaning logs aur records se cleaning activities ko track kiya ja sakta hai, quality control maintain ki jaati hai aur regulatory compliance ensure hoti hai.

questions.question: Effective communication mein 'clarity' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Apni baat ko seedhe aur samajhne yogya tarike se kehna

questions.explanation: Clarity ka matlab hai apni baat ko itne seedhe aur spasht tarike se kehna ki dusra vyakti use aasaani se samajh sake.

questions.question: Agar kisi ko 'choking' ho rahi ho, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Heimlich maneuver perform karenge agar trained ho, ya medical help call karenge

questions.explanation: Choking ek medical emergency hai. Agar aap trained hain toh Heimlich maneuver perform karein, ya turant medical emergency services ko call karein.

questions.question: Housekeeping staff ke liye 'initiative' lena kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf extra kaam karne ke liye
options.B: Problems ko proactively address karna aur kaam ko behtar banane ke liye
options.D: Dusre logo ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Initiative lene ka matlab hai problems ko khud pehchanna aur unhe solve karne ke liye kadam uthana, jisse productivity aur efficiency badhti hai.

questions.question: Security awareness mein 'unauthorized access' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Kisi ka bhi building mein aana
options.B: Kisi aise vyakti ka building mein ghusna jise permission nahi hai

questions.explanation: Unauthorized access ka matlab hai kisi aise vyakti ka building mein ghusna jise wahan hone ki permission nahi hai, jo security risk ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Visitor management system ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Visitors ko track karna, unki safety ensure karna aur unauthorized access rokna

questions.explanation: Visitor management system visitors ko track karta hai, unki identity verify karta hai aur facility ki security maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko koi 'suspicious package' dikhe, toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Usko disturb nahi karenge aur turant security ya supervisor ko report karenge

questions.explanation: Suspicious package ko kabhi disturb nahi karna chahiye. Turant security ya supervisor ko inform karein aur area ko evacuate karein.

questions.question: Housekeeping staff ke liye 'confidentiality' kyun important hai?

options.A: Sirf personal baatein chhupane ke liye
options.B: Company aur clients ki sensitive information ko secure rakhne ke liye
options.C: Sab kuch sabko batane ke liye

questions.explanation: Confidentiality ka matlab hai company aur clients ki sensitive information ko secret rakhna, jo professional ethics ka hissa hai.

questions.question: Conflict resolution mein 'patience' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Situations ko calmly handle karna aur solutions dhoondhne ke liye samay dena

questions.explanation: Patience se conflicts ko calmly resolve kiya ja sakta hai aur dono parties ko sunne ka mauka milta hai.

questions.question: Ek 'evacuation plan' mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Emergency exits, assembly points aur emergency contact numbers

questions.explanation: Evacuation plan mein emergency exits, assembly points, aur emergency contact numbers ki jaankari hoti hai takki log surakshit roop se evacuate ho sakein.

questions.question: Professional development courses aur training kyun important hain?

options.B: Skills enhance karne, industry best practices seekhne aur career growth ke liye

questions.explanation: Professional development courses staff ki skills ko update karte hain, unhe nayi techniques sikhate hain aur career growth mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Agar aapko koi 'medical emergency' dikhe, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Calm rahenge, situation assess karenge, first aid denge agar trained ho, aur medical emergency services ko call karenge

questions.explanation: Medical emergency mein calm rehna, situation ko assess karna, zaroorat padne par first aid dena aur professional medical help bulana zaroori hai.

questions.question: Housekeeping mein 'adaptability' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf ek hi tareeke se kaam karna
options.B: Unexpected situations ya changes ko effectively adjust karna

questions.explanation: Adaptability ka matlab hai naye challenges, badalte schedules ya unexpected situations mein khud ko dhal lena aur kaam ko effectively karna.
